author: tashapais
name: SP8192 + CaseOps + Gated Attention + Quant Gate + Loop345 + Recur-Alpha + Phased TTT
blurb: Adds Recur-Alpha (learned scalar carry per looped block, init=0) to the PR #1736 CaseOps+GatedAttn+QuantGate+Loop345+PhasedTTT stack. Recur-Alpha lets training decide how much first-visit activation to forward into subsequent recurrence passes. Costs 3 parameters, adds GRU-like memory to the depth recurrence with zero effect at initialization.
